title: 2020 CC001 CSH Caribou Permit Report
summary: 2019-2020 Community Subsistence Harvest Caribou Hunt Permits are to be returned to the Alaska Dept. of Fish & Game Office in Glennallen, Alaska, completed online at www.adfg.alaska.gov , or CSH Participants can call (907) 822-3461 to report Caribou permit.
